properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v2 v3 v3 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Each time I doubt Your goodness You show me You are with us Your presence makes the difference I've seen it every time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What a good God Bringing me back to life Opening up my eyes God of every blessing Standing by my side

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Calling me by name I won't be afraid Faithful to Your promise You will make a way

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No wall can stop Your kindness No place Your love won't find us Mercy is right behind us I've seen it every time

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Calling me by name I won't be afraid Faithful to Your promise You will make a way You will make a way

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I've seen it, I've seen it I've seen it every time I've seen it, I've seen it I've seen it every time You're faithful, You're faithful You're faithful every time You're faithful, You're faithful You're faithful every time I've seen it, I've seen it I've seen it every time You're faithful, You're faithful You're faithful

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I've seen it, I've seen it I've seen it every time I've seen it, I've seen it I've seen it every time You're faithful, You're faithful You're faithful every time You're faithful, You're faithful You're faithful (Yeah) You're faithful You're faithful You're faithful
